2604.21312.title: The First Challenge on Remote Sensing Infrared Image Super-Resolution at NTIRE 2026: Benchmark Results and Method Overview
2604.21312.paper_summary: This paper presents the NTIRE 2026 Remote Sensing Infrared Image Super-Resolution (x4) Challenge, one of the associated challenges of NTIRE 2026. The challenge aims to recover high-resolution (HR) infrared images from low-resolution (LR) inputs generated through bicubic downsampling with a x4 scaling factor. The objective is to develop effective models or solutions that achieve state-of-the-art performance for infrared image SR in remote sensing scenarios. To reflect the characteristics of infrared data and practical application needs, the challenge adopts a single-track setting. A total of 115 participants registered for the competition, with 13 teams submitting valid entries. This report summarizes the challenge design, dataset, evaluation protocol, main results, and the representative methods of each team. The challenge serves as a benchmark to advance research in infrared image super-resolution and promote the development of effective solutions for real-world remote sensing applications.
2604.21312.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文介紹了 NTIRE 2026 遙感紅外影像超解析度 (x4) 挑戰，這是 NTIRE 2026 的相關挑戰之一。<lb/>該挑戰旨在從通過 x4 縮放因子進行雙三次下採樣生成的低解析度 (LR) 輸入中恢復高解析度 (HR) 紅外影像。<lb/>目標是開發有效的模型或解決方案，以在遙感場景中實現紅外影像超解析度的最先進性能。<lb/>為了反映紅外數據的特性和實際應用需求，該挑戰採用單軌設置。<lb/>總共有 115 位參與者註冊參加比賽，13 支隊伍提交了有效的參賽作品。<lb/>本報告總結了挑戰設計、數據集、評估協議、主要結果以及每支隊伍的代表方法。<lb/>該挑戰作為基準，推進紅外影像超解析度的研究，並促進針對現實世界遙感應用的有效解決方案的發展。
2604.21312.author: Kai Liu et.al.
